title: English install-local + dev note
goal: Translate the comments and output of scripts/install-local.sh into English, and add a short developer note to README.md about the local dev installation (npm run install-local).

steps.title: Translate install-local.sh comments to English
steps.detail: Header comment block (purpose, layout, rollback note) fully in English.

steps.title: Translate install-local.sh echo output to English
steps.detail: All runtime echo messages in English.

steps.title: Add local dev install note to README
steps.detail: Under '### From git / for development', document npm run install-local: installs to ~/.local, keeps older versions for rollback, how to run and verify.

steps.title: Verify English-only & run install-local
steps.detail: No Czech left in the script; npm run install-local succeeds and mini --version works.
